title: Automatic Replanting
description: This Fabric mod enables automatic crop replanting in Minecraft. When a player harvests a fully grown crop, the mod consumes one seed from their inventory and immediately replants the crop at the same spot.
body:
This Fabric utility mod enhances farming by automating the reseeding process. It uses the Player Block Break Event to check if a fully grown crop was just harvested. If the player possesses the required seed item in their inventory, the mod consumes one seed and immediately places a new, unplanted crop at the same location. This removes the need for manual replanting, allowing for efficient, continuous harvesting.

Only works on the following:
- Potatoes
- Carrots
- Wheat
- Beetroots
